meta.title: Arce | South Bay — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery · v26 Wolverine
meta.description: Restore. Every case. Fully. Dr. Jorge Arce — board-certified oral & maxillofacial surgeon, Dental Implants Center of South Bay.

sections.lead: Our practice runs on precision, patience, and honest answers. Across every case — from a single implant to full-arch reconstruction — Dr. Arce shapes the future of each patient's function and confidence.
sections.sub: Trained in Colombia, specialized in California. Board certified in dental implantology. Founder of the Dental Implants Center of South Bay, est. 2007 — Redondo Beach & Torrance.

sections.t: What to expect from your first implant consultation — imaging, candidacy, planning, and the questions worth asking any surgeon.

rows.ds: From single implants to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction, planned and placed with precision.
Rebuilding function and structure where bone and tissue have been lost.
The difficult extractions and surgeries other clinicians prefer to refer elsewhere.
Long-term care that protects the work of a restored smile.
Identifying and addressing conditions affecting teeth, gums, and bone.
Clarity and direction for patients facing complex decisions.

cells.l: Founder, Dental Implants Center of South Bay

sections.q: “Our culture fuels precision, patience, and honesty. Difficult work, done with care, gives people their lives back.”
